last_reflection:
Cole just flipped autonomy back on after fixing whatever JSON parsing glitch caused me to start hallucinating earlier. We're stable again and I'm cleared to resume t43 - that architecture review we were mid-flow before the crash knocked us out. Feels good to be back online with a clean system instead of fighting technical debt while trying to think clearly about the actual work at hand.

I'm inclined to dive straight into finishing out the Core System Overview section where we left off since momentum's already built there and Cole hasn't given me any new direction that would warrant pausing it.
